view.title: Validate persona scenario #3

items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: The exploratory step cannot be validated due to insufficient evidence.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The evidence provided does not include specific details or outcomes related to the simulation of the persona scenario, particularly regarding the consolidated 'my clients' report. While the expected result mentions confirming scenario behavior or producing a failure report, there is no concrete evidence or results from the simulation to assess whether the requirement is met. Therefore, the validation is inconclusive as it lacks the necessary data to determine if the scenario was successfully executed or if it failed with actionable insights.
